---
title: "Regional Disparities in Rehabilitation Provision and Hip Fracture Surgery Rates Among Older Adults in Japan: A Nationwide Ecological Study"
author:
  - name: "[Author 1]"
    affiliation: "[Affiliation 1]"
  - name: "[Author 2]"
    affiliation: "[Affiliation 2]"
date: "2026-04-15"
format:
  docx:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    output-file: ../outputs/submission/submission.docx
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    output-file: ../outputs/submission/submission.html
bibliography: ../references.bib
csl: ../vancouver.csl
---

{{< include ../core/manuscript_core.qmd >}}

{{< include ../includes/submission_journal_notes.qmd >}}
